functions.name: area
functions.description: Get a numpy array of the block area.

functions.name: density
functions.description: Get a numpy array of the block density.

functions.name: dsf
functions.description: Get a numpy array of the block density scaling factor.

functions.name: extra
functions.signature: itasca.blockarray.extra(slot: int) -> array float{block} or float{block,3}
functions.description: Get the block extra data in the given slot as an array. Extra variables accessed by array must be of type float or vec.

functions.name: fill_pos
functions.description: Fill an existing array with the block centroid location. The array must be the correct shape.

functions.name: ids
functions.description: Get the block ids as an array.

functions.name: in_group
functions.description: Return block group membership as a Boolean array.

functions.name: is_excavated
functions.description: Get a numpy array of the block excavated flag.

functions.name: is_rigid
functions.description: Get a numpy array of the block rigid flag.

functions.name: pos
functions.description: Get a numpy array of the block centroid location.

functions.name: set_extra
functions.signature: itasca.blockarray.set_extra(slot: int, data: array float{block} or float{block, 3}) -> None
functions.description: Set the block extra data in the given slot with an array. Extra variables set by array must be of type float or vec.

functions.name: set_group
functions.signature: itasca.blockarray.set_group(membership: array bool{nblock}, group_name: str, slot="default") -> None
functions.description: Set block group from an array. Where membership True set the corresponding block to be a member of group group_name in the given slot.

functions.name: vol
functions.description: Get a numpy array of the block volumic.
